summary: Issue #294 deliverables pass: 8 sanitized Layer 1 fixtures, regeneration script, contract tests, endpoints.md and handoff updated. WARNING: contract-collection.md in working tree contains live ROW_* tokens in cURL blocks — exclude from #294 PR or redact before merge.

criticalFindings.description: docs/tiktok_api/contract-collection.md contains ~30 ROW_* token/cipher literals in Request Demo cURL blocks. Fixtures and samples/ are sanitized; this file must not merge until cURLs use {access_token}/{shop_cipher} placeholders.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Redact contract-collection.md cURL blocks before including in PR, or ship #294 fixtures/endpoints only without contract-collection.md.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: #294 PR scopes fixtures + endpoints only; contract-collection.md stays local until sanitization pass lands separately.

mappings.criterion: Sanitized JSON samples no secrets buyer PII

reviewerSignoff.statement: Reviewed #294 scoped deliverables; accepted ship-as-is for contract-collection exclusion from this PR

ownerSignoff.statement: Acknowledged: contract-collection.md must be redacted before separate commit
